In a simple symmetric random walk on a locally finite lattice, the probabilities of the location jumping to each one of its immediate neighbors are the same

annotations.label: Meeting of two independent random walks

anchor.snippet: the difference between their locations (two independent random walks) is also a simple random walk, so they almost surely meet again in a 2-dimensional walk

annotations.label: Boundary of Wiener trajectory has dimension 4/3
